landing.heroSubtitle: Upload spreadsheets, automatically detect transactional anomalies, and let AI build real-time dashboards for your entire team.
landing.featuresSubtitle: No manual copy-pasting. Everything is automated.
landing.feature1Desc: Ingest CSV, PDF, and spreadsheets directly. AI automatically detects anomalies and key metrics.
landing.feature2Desc: Interactive chart generators construct dynamic line charts, bar graphs, and pie charts from your data.
landing.feature3Desc: Get real-time alerts on cash flow anomalies, pricing errors, and unusual transaction patterns.
landing.testimonial1Quote: AI Report Automation saved us 20+ hours per week on manual report generation. The anomaly detection is incredibly accurate.
landing.testimonial2Quote: The anomalies detection engine caught a pricing configuration issue that would have cost us $50K in the first month alone.
landing.faq1Question: What file formats does the platform support?
landing.faq1Answer: Our parsing engines accept standard CSV spreadsheets, Excel workbooks (XLSX/XLS), and PDF documents. AI automatically maps columns.
landing.faq2Question: How does the Stripe Checkout system work?
landing.faq2Answer: Upgrading to Pro calls a secure Stripe Checkout API. Payments are processed securely and subscriptions are activated instantly.
landing.faq3Question: Are my business spreadsheets kept confidential?
landing.faq3Answer: Yes. All data uploads are scoped to your specific tenant organization. Only authorized team members can access reports.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Register your workspace, invite your team, and let AI handle the rest.
